name: Indole-3-propionic acid aged-mouse and Drosophila healthspan study
summary: Preclinical study testing indole-3-propionic acid in aged C57BL/6 mice for 12 weeks and in Drosophila lifespan assays.
model_system: Aged C57BL/6 mice treated with indole-3-propionic acid and Drosophila melanogaster lifespan models
